title: 2026/02/18 - GA [Part 1]
displayTitle: 2026-02-17 - Governance and Administration Committee - Emergency Management Bill [Part 1]
description: Wednesday 18 February 2026 | Governance and Administration Committee Emergency Management Bill (No 2) Hawke's Bay Civil Defence Emergency Management Group - Sophie Siers, Chair of Joint Committee - Shane Briggs, Director of Hawkes Bay Emergency Management, and Statutory role of Group Controller Hawke's Bay Regional Council - Sophie Siers, Chair of Hawkes Bay Regional Council - Katrina Brunton, Group Manager Policy and Regulations Hato Hone St John - Peter Bradley, Chief Executive - Doug Gallagher, General Manager, Ambulance Operations Integrated Operations Centre Canterbury Regional Council (Environment Canterbury) - Dr Deon Swiggs, Chair, Canterbury Regional Council - John Sunckell, Councillor, Canterbury Regional Council and Deputy Chair of the Canterbury Civil Defence Emergency Management Group Joint Committee
descriptionSummary: Emergency Management Bill. Emergency Management Bill (No 2). Hawke's Bay Civil Defence Emergency Management Group

First up, you will have heard it from lots of people we know this funding, uh, the, that you, you all know that the bill creates significant new responsibilities for councils. Good. Rates capping are just on civil defense, um, upgrade. So we need to be really aware of that.
